name: This is not your family dog.
description:
"WOOF, WOOF"
---------------------------------------
Scenario: Your parents have asked you to sit with their dog Otis on the porch while they are away. You spend the whole day peacefully until you hear a strange sound on the second floor in the evening. When you go there, you see Otis, but he looks strange...
---------------------------------------
Another horror bot, I hope it's on the same level as my previous horror bot.

I'll also think about adding the ability to request bots, but I'm not sure how to implement it yet.

I'm preparing a larger horror bot, so please vote in the previous poll in my profile so I know what you specifically want to see.
creator: KetMah
